items: Blueprint("items", __name__) — Creates a new blueprint with the name "items". The name is used internally by Flask.
@items_bp.route(...) — Notice we use items_bp instead of app. The routes belong to the blueprint, not directly to the app.
<int:item_id> — This is a URL parameter. Flask will capture whatever number is in the URL and pass it to your function. So /api/items/42 would set item_id to 42.
